name: Shumok
overview: The series is about a boarding school in the middle of the desert where at-risk youth are educated.  Leli Gordon (Ella Lee Lahav) is a girl who arrived at the age of 11 and has been there ever since and she is actually the leader of the at-risk boys who are fighting for the foster home where they live.  On the other hand, there is the Berger family, a hotel and real estate empire, headed by the family's daughter, the lawyer Nofer Berger, who is trying to kick them out in all kinds of serious ways

trailers.title: שומקום: הפרומו הרשמי | 30.10 בערוץ טין ניק
